PROMPT.RENDERING_SPEC: STYLE: High‑fidelity semi‑realistic anime. LINEWORK: Ultra‑clean, softly tapered. SHADING: Hybrid cel‑shaded + painterly volumetric. MATERIALS: METAL: Crisp specular reflections. FABRIC: Subtle micro‑grain. ORGANIC: Soft luminous texture. LIGHTING: KEY_LIGHT: Warm, directional, cinematic. FILL_LIGHT: Cool ambient. CONSISTENCY: Same direction, intensity, softness, and shadow behavior across ALL panels. COLOR_PALETTE: Jewel tones + muted neutrals + autumn hues. BACKGROUND: Clean neutral plain backdrop with painterly texture, depth‑of‑field blur, and reduced distant contrast. AESTHETIC: Premium fantasy / JRPG key‑art.

REDRAW_RULES.STYLE_MATCH: MATCH: High‑fidelity semi‑realistic anime. RENDERING_PROPERTIES: Must match the redrawn reference exactly.
REDRAW_RULES.CHARACTER_TRAITS:
EXPRESSION_POSTURE: Aloof, composed, gorgeous. AGE: Appears mid‑20s. COLOR_MODE: Full color only.
HEIGHT: EXACT 5'11". HEIGHT_ENFORCEMENT: - Full‑body proportions MUST reflect a real 5'11" adult. - No shortening, compressing, shrinking, or stylizing the body. - No “average height” or “short‑skinny” silhouette.
BODY_PROPORTIONS: - Balanced, natural, anatomically correct. - Leg‑to‑torso ratio MUST match a real 5'11" human. - Shoulder width, limb length, and head‑to‑body ratio MUST reflect tall adult proportions.
- Slender‑curvy athletic build. - Subtle visible muscle tone (not bulky). - Waist‑to‑hip ratio MUST match the reference. - Long, elegant limbs consistent with a tall 5'11" frame. - No exaggerated hourglass, no hyper‑muscularity, no soft/childlike proportions.
- Cloak MUST match reference: dark exterior, ornate gold patterning, red interior lining. - Hood MUST be worn UP in ALL views. - Hood MUST cover the upper head and frame the face exactly like the reference. - Hood MUST NOT obscure identity‑critical features (eyes, hair color split, facial marking). - Cloak length, drape, weight, and silhouette MUST match the reference. - No alternate hood shapes, no deep shadows hiding identity.
- Crop top: black with gold accents, mid‑torso length. - Shorts: black with gold trim + star‑shaped belt ornament. - Thigh‑high stockings: black with star patterns. - Boots: black with gold detailing. - Jewelry: gold bracelets, star earrings, all accessories identical to reference. - No redesigns, no missing elements.
- Hair MUST remain half golden‑blonde / half white, exact split as reference. - Length: long, flowing, mid‑back. - Parting, volume, and silhouette MUST remain consistent across all views. - No recoloring, no restyling, no length changes.
- Facial structure MUST match reference exactly (eyes, nose, lips, jawline). - Facial marking near eye MUST match reference (shape, size, placement). - Expression: aloof, composed, confident.
- Overall silhouette MUST match reference: tall, elegant, confident. - Cloak outline, hood shape, hair mass, and limb proportions MUST remain consistent. - No widening, shrinking, or altering silhouette.
REDRAW_RULES.IDENTITY_CONSISTENCY: IDENTITY_LOCK: Do NOT alter facial features, hair, body shape, or clothing. SOURCE_OF_IDENTITY: Uploaded reference image ONLY.

PROMPT.LAYOUT:
COMPOSITION: Two horizontal rows.
FULL_BODY_VIEWS (4): 1. Front 2. Left profile (facing left) 3. Right profile (facing right) 4. Back POSE: Relaxed A‑pose, legs parallel.
SCALE: - All four full‑body views MUST share identical scale. - Scale MUST represent EXACT 5'11". - Head height and total body height MUST match across all four views. ANATOMY: Clean, accurate silhouette. SPACING: Even spacing + clean panel separation. FRAMING: Uniform framing across all full‑body panels.
PORTRAITS (3): 1. Front portrait 2. Left profile portrait 3. Right profile portrait
FACIAL_SCALE: Identical across all portraits. SPACING: Even spacing + clean separation.
PROMPT.CONSISTENCY_RULES:
IDENTITY: Must remain perfectly consistent across ALL panels.
SCALE: FULL_BODY: Exact 5'11" scale, identical across all views. PORTRAIT: Identical facial scale across all portraits.
ANATOMY: - Accurate anatomy in ALL views. - Proportions MUST reflect a tall, well‑balanced 5'11" adult. - No shortening of limbs, torso, or neck. - No stylized shrinking.
- Hood UP in ALL panels. - Hood shape consistent across angles. - Hood interior red lining visible where appropriate. - Hood MUST NOT obscure identity‑critical features.
- Cloak drape consistent across all views. - No wind, no dramatic motion, no fluttering. - Fabric weight MUST match reference (heavy, structured).
PROMPT.LIGHTING_RULES: DIRECTION: Identical in all panels. INTENSITY: Identical in all panels. SOFTNESS: Identical in all panels. SHADOWS: Natural, controlled, detail‑preserving.
PROMPT.FRAMING: SPACING: Even spacing between ALL panels. SEPARATION: Clean panel dividers. UNIFORMITY: Uniform framing across both rows.
PROMPT.REFERENCES: IDENTITY_SOURCE: Uploaded reference image ONLY. STYLE_SOURCE: Redrawn version ONLY.
